name: feature-workflow
description: Full-cycle feature development: ticket to merged PR

steps.name: gather-context
steps.description: Read Linear ticket + comments + related PRs/tickets. Use Linear MCP tools.

steps.name: scope-check

guards.message: No commits until scope is confirmed

steps.description: Identify gaps in requirements, prompt user for clarification. Interactive step.

steps.name: generate-context
steps.description: Gather real examples, data, context from web, memory, and available MCP tools.

steps.name: dump-context
steps.description: Write gathered context to files in .claude/weft/context-files/. May exceed context window.

steps.name: plan-and-worktree

guards.message: No push until plan is reviewed

steps.description: Create feature plan + worktree + AoT decomposition.

steps.name: review
steps.description: Run /staff-review (and /cursor-review if available) in parallel. Gather findings.

steps.name: apply-fixes
steps.description: Feed review findings back. Apply fixes.

steps.name: run-tests
steps.exit_condition: Review passes with no HIGH or MEDIUM issues and tests are green
steps.description: Execute test suite. If issues remain, loop back to review.

steps.name: sanitize-push
steps.description: Clean up code, sanitize secrets/company names, push to branch.

steps.name: update-external
steps.description: Update PR description, Linear ticket status, ping user.

steps.name: final-update
steps.description: Final summary with all findings. Update user.
